Home › Lake County › Clermont › Organic Restaurants

Organic Restaurants in Clermont

A high rating isn't a clean kitchen — SAN JOSES ORIGINAL MEXICAN RESTAURANT proves it here, 4.5 stars on a D grade. That's why each of these 4 restaurants with organic options in Clermont shows its health inspection result, not just its stars.

4 organic restaurants

  • B 84 K
    KEKE'S BREAKFAST CAFE American ★ 4.7 (3847) Clermont · Lake County VegOrganic +1 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 75 I
    IHOP RESTAURANT 36-205 American ★ 4.7 (7369) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • C 71 F
    FIRST WATCH RESTAURANT Other ★ 4.5 (1767) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +3 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • D 66 S
    SAN JOSES ORIGINAL MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.5 (2023) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +1 more Inspected Nov 2025
